subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-01-23
subcodes.first_line: The artist has drawn very beautiful pictures for she has painted allegorical figures on this canvas - each figure carries a lantern
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @effort; striving, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal
